title: Drawing Dead: The Highs & Lows of Online Poker
original_title: Drawing Dead: The Highs and Lows of Online Poker
overview: Drawing Dead is a documentary film about the highs and lows of online poker from two very different perspectives: a professional poker player worth millions, and a gambling addict.
